channel.title: Webinar on Samuel Rincé
channel.description: Recent content in Webinar on Samuel Rincé

item.title: Panel on the environmental impacts of data centers
item.description: I joined an ECOS webinar organised around the release of its new whitepaper, From innovation to overshoot: How data centre expansion risks derailing climate goals, co-published with Open Future. The discussion focused on the broader context behind data centre growth: rising demand from AI and digital services, growing pressure on electricity systems, and the need to look beyond efficiency alone when assessing environmental impacts.

item.title: Green AI: Navigating between the hype and the environmental impacts of AI
item.description: Artificial Intelligence has a significant environmental footprint, and its development and adoption by both the public and organizations continue to expand steadily. Big tech companies are pushing Generative AI to the extent that it delays their environmental impact reduction targets.
